action.name: Flatten Folder
action.description: Moves all files from sub-folders to parent (current) folder, then removes all empty folders inside the current folder.

action.name: Rename to lower-case
action.command: for file in %N; do mv "$file" "$(echo "$file" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"; done
action.description: Rename the currently selected files, making the filenames lower-case.

action.name: Slugify Filename
action.command: for file in %N; do mv "$file" "$(echo "$file" | tr -s ' ' | tr ' A-Z' '-a-z' | tr -s '-' | tr -c '[:alnum:][:cntrl:].' '-')"; done
action.description: Rename the currently selected files, making the filenames lower-case & replacing spaces with dashes.

action.name: Copy Contents to Clipboard
action.description: Copies the contents of the selected file to the clipboard.

action.name: Compare
action.description: Compares selected files or folders in Meld

action.name: Compress with Advpng
action.command: for file in %F; do advpng -z -4 -q "$file"; done
action.description: Runs Advpng on each of the selected PNG Files.

action.name: Quantize with pngnq
action.command: for file in %F; do pngnq -s1 "$file"; done
action.description: Reduce to 8bit colour, by running pngnq on each of the selected PNG Files.

action.name: Optimize with jpegoptim
action.command: for file in %F; do jpegoptim --strip-all -of "$file"; done
action.description: Losslessly optimize JPEGs, by optimizing the Huffman tables and stripping comments and EXIF metadata from the file.
